arts.ttl: Paul Merson sets Liverpool two-game points target to make title race 'virtually over'
arts.sum: Liverpool are seven points clear of Arsenal in the Premier League title race and former Gunners star Paul Merson believes their clashes with Aston Villa and Manchester City are huge

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Gomez might need surgery after 'big blow'
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Joe Gomez could require surgery after suffering another hamstring injury, Arne Slot tells a news conference.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Aston Villa: Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool could increase their Premier League lead over Arsenal to 10 points with a win vs. Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: I won't lose sleep over that celebration - new Everton Stadium is good for Liverpool too
arts.sum: Chris Beesley has his say on the Merseyside Derby rivalries having an impact on the move to the new Everton Stadium

arts.ttl: Ten players could be missing from Liverpool Premier League clash at Aston Villa
arts.sum: Arne Slot is waiting for an update on the fitness of his Liverpool players ahead of the Premier League clash at Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Sources: Mo Salah has shown his desire for what’s next in recent Liverpool negotiations
arts.sum: Mo Salah and his representatives have held another round of transfer talks with Liverpool and it’s believed the Egyptian King made his preference as to what’s next in his career crystal clear. arts.ttl: I met Liverpool legend in his apartment - Aston Villa and Tottenham wanted me but I couldn’t say no
arts.sum: Charlie Adam has opened up about holding transfer talks with former Liverpool manager Gerard Houllier and why he didn't have to think twice about joining the Reds

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Aston Villa take on Liverpool in the Premier League on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa vs Liverpool: TV channel, live stream, kick off time
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to Villa Park in a clash with hefty title ramifications on Wednesday, and many football fans in the UK will be keen to watch Arne Slot’s side showdown with Aston Villa live on TV
